title: Iranlọwọ ati atilẹyin
description: A wa nibi lati ṣe iranlọwọ pẹlu eyikeyi ibeere tabi awọn ọran ti o le ba pade lakoko lilo ohun elo wẹẹbu wa. Boya o nilo iranlọwọ lati bẹrẹ, ni ibeere nipa ẹya kan, tabi fẹ jabo kokoro kan, a wa nibi lati ṣe iranlọwọ.

contact.title: Olubasọrọ Support
contact.emailDesc: A ṣe ifọkansi lati dahun si gbogbo awọn imeeli laarin awọn wakati 24.
contact.footer: O ṣeun fun yiyan ohun elo wẹẹbu wa. A ti pinnu lati jẹ ki iriri rẹ jẹ ki o dan ati igbadun bi o ti ṣee ṣe.

detailedFeatures.title: Alaye Atilẹyin Ẹya
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Pipinpin ti igbewọle ohun ati awọn agbara Ọrọ-si-Ọrọ fun ẹrọ kan.

mobileHeaders.mobile: Mobile App Awọn ẹya ara ẹrọ
